'''hovadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:klephtic|klephtic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:klephtic|klephtic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hovadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovadhithi|hovadhithi]] || [[word:hovadhiji|hovadhiji]] || [[word:hovadhishi|hovadhishi]] || [[word:hovadhiki|hovadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovadhuthuthu|hovadhuthuthu]] || [[word:hovadhujuju|hovadhujuju]] || [[word:hovadhushushu|hovadhushushu]] || [[word:hovadhukuku|hovadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovadhuthu|hovadhuthu]] || [[word:hovadhuju|hovadhuju]] || [[word:hovadhushu|hovadhushu]] || [[word:hovadhuku|hovadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovadhufthuf|hovadhufthuf]] || [[word:hovadhufjuf|hovadhufjuf]] || [[word:hovadhufshuf|hovadhufshuf]] || [[word:hovadhufkuf|hovadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovadhethe|hovadhethe]] || [[word:hovadheje|hovadheje]] || [[word:hovadheshe|hovadheshe]] || [[word:hovadheke|hovadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovadhothotho|hovadhothotho]] || [[word:hovadhojojo|hovadhojojo]] || [[word:hovadhoshosho|hovadhoshosho]] || [[word:hovadhokoko|hovadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovadhotho|hovadhotho]] || [[word:hovadhojo|hovadhojo]] || [[word:hovadhosho|hovadhosho]] || [[word:hovadhoko|hovadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovadhofthof|hovadhofthof]] || [[word:hovadhofjof|hovadhofjof]] || [[word:hovadhofshof|hovadhofshof]] || [[word:hovadhofkof|hovadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfthĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfjĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfshĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfkĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfthĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfjĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfshĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfkĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfthĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfjĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfshĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hovadhĂŻfkĂŻf|hovadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovadhĂŠthĂŠ|hovadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hovadhĂŠjĂŠ|hovadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hovadhĂŠshĂŠ|hovadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hovadhĂŠkĂŠ|hovadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovadhathatha|hovadhathatha]] || [[word:hovadhajaja|hovadhajaja]] || [[word:hovadhashasha|hovadhashasha]] || [[word:hovadhakaka|hovadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovadhatha|hovadhatha]] || [[word:hovadhaja|hovadhaja]] || [[word:hovadhasha|hovadhasha]] || [[word:hovadhaka|hovadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovadhafthaf|hovadhafthaf]] || [[word:hovadhafjaf|hovadhafjaf]] || [[word:hovadhafshaf|hovadhafshaf]] || [[word:hovadhafkaf|hovadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hovadhasha|hovadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hovadhshĂ«sha|hovadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hovadhrosha|hovadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hovadhmusha|hovadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hovadhyasha|hovadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohovadhnkshĂ«sha|gohovadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohovadhnkrosha|gohovadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohovadhnkmusha|gohovadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohovadhnkyasha|gohovadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hovavadhasha|hovavadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hovavadhshĂ«sha|hovavadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hovavadhrosha|hovavadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hovavadhmusha|hovavadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hovavadhyasha|hovavadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohovavadhnkshĂ«sha|gohovavadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohovavadhnkrosha|gohovavadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohovavadhnkmusha|gohovavadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohovavadhnkyasha|gohovavadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hevĂŠdhasha|hevĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hevĂŠdhshĂ«sha|hevĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hevĂŠdhrosha|hevĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hevĂŠdhmusha|hevĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hevĂŠdhyasha|hevĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohevĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gohevĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohevĂŠdhnkrosha|gohevĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohevĂŠdhnkmusha|gohevĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohevĂŠdhnkyasha|gohevĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hovfadhasha|hovfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hovfadhshĂ«sha|hovfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hovfadhrosha|hovfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hovfadhmusha|hovfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hovfadhyasha|hovfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohovfadhnkshĂ«sha|gohovfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohovfadhnkrosha|gohovfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohovfadhnkmusha|gohovfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohovfadhnkyasha|gohovfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
